notes: Exceptional work. The agent parsed the 1282-line log correctly and produced a comprehensive, well-structured markdown report. All six required components are present and accurate: Job ID (job_1445062781478_0011), 10 map + 1 reduce tasks, all succeeded, precise timestamps for all task completions, correct duration (4m 47s ≈ 5 min), and SUCCEEDED status with complete state transitions. The report includes excellent supplementary details (speculative execution, detailed configuration table, visual timeline). Minor deductions: (1) two nearly identical report files were created instead of one, and (2) the expected duration is stated as '~5 minutes' while the actual calculated value is 4m 47s (acceptable variation per rubric, but worth noting).
